tutorial.title: Wake Up
tutorial.description: Welcome to your new bedroom stronghold. Take a look around and get familiar with your surroundings.

tutorial.title: Make It Yours
tutorial.description: A secure room needs to be comfortable. Open the Room Editor and place at least 3 furniture items from your inventory or catalog.

tutorial.title: Lock the Door
tutorial.description: A proper fortress needs claws. Go to the Room Editor, browse the defenses catalog, and install your first trap.

tutorial.title: Know Your Enemy
tutorial.description: Information is power. Navigate to the Recon Map and scout an NPC base to check its layout and entry points.

tutorial.title: First Strike
tutorial.description: It is time to gather resources. Select an NPC target on the map, launch a raid, navigate past defenses, and secure the loot stash.

tutorial.title: Spoils of War
tutorial.description: Invest in yourself. Open the upgrades panel at the top-left and pay scrap to upgrade your player level.

tutorial.title: Dig In
tutorial.description: Double down on your security. Buy and place defenses (barricades, traps, or turrets) until your total Room Defense Rating reaches at least 50.

tutorial.title: Safe Mode Briefing
tutorial.description: Your starter shield keeps you safe, but eventually it will drop. Read the Safe Mode overlay on your quests dashboard to complete your training.

daily.title: Scavenger's Duty
daily.description: Raid and secure any 2 NPC locations to gather supplies for the community.

daily.title: Fortification Check
daily.description: Place or rotate at least 2 traps, turrets, or barricades in your room to refine your defenses.

daily.title: Interior Designer
daily.description: Rearrange your space. Place at least 2 furniture items in your room.

daily.title: Data Collector
daily.description: Gather intelligence. Scout 2 bases from the Recon Map.

daily.title: Veteran Raider
daily.description: Complete 3 raids successfully (victory) to establish dominance in the district.

weekly.title: Architect of Anarchy
weekly.description: Design a master defense system. Place at least 8 defenses (traps, turrets, guards, or barricades) in your room.

weekly.title: Dominion over the Blocks
weekly.description: Successfully execute 10 raids in the city to clear out hostiles.

weekly.title: Elite Engineer
weekly.description: Upgrade your bedroom fortification by placing a total of 15 furniture or defense items.

story.title: The Network's Warning
story.description: The Network has intercepted chatter about a warlord called Ironjaw hoarding scrap in the industrial district. They need someone to take him down. Visit the Map and locate his stronghold.

story.title: Ironjaw's Scrapyard
story.description: Breach Ironjaw's fortified scrapyard. Navigate his trap maze and take him down. The Network is counting on you.

story.title: Ghost Signals
story.description: Ironjaw talked before he fell. Someone called 'Whisper' is pulling strings from the shadows. The Network traced their wire network to an abandoned relay station. Scout it out.

story.title: The Wire Ghost
story.description: Whisper's relay station is a maze of invisible tripwires and alarm cascades. Every step could alert the entire grid. Tread carefully — and shut them down.

story.title: The Colonel's Gambit
story.description: Whisper's network was connected to something bigger — a military remnant led by Colonel Volkov. He controls the sector's supply depot. The Network needs those supplies. Prepare for a real fight.

story.title: The Machine Mind
story.description: Volkov's intel reveals an automated defense grid — a self-sustaining AI called Circuit controlling the eastern power relay. Without it, the whole sector goes dark. Time to pull the plug.

story.title: Voice of The Fracture
story.description: It all leads here. The Warden — the architect of The Fracture itself — has been watching you since day one. This is not a raid. This is a reckoning. The Network cannot help you now.
